title: pleopeltis acicularis
intro: Pleopeltis acicularis, also known as the linear-leaved polypody fern or needle-leaved polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleopeltis acicularis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
